subject: Xacml PDP Helm Charts Added
commit_message:
Xacml PDP Helm Charts Added

Added the helm charts for xacml-pdp componnent
Added nodePort 41 and updated the oom wiki
Changed the chart directory name to policy-xacml-pdp

Correct image name and usage of port values in service

Remove node port usage

Change-Id: I8b3fc85053b56eab15103cd748247e75b96e9147
Issue-ID: POLICY-1436
Signed-off-by: Michael Mokry <michael.mokry@att.com>
Signed-off-by: Jorge Hernandez <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>

Hi Mike, the directory name xacml-pdp should match the Chart name which is "policy-xacml-pdp" if you look in Chart.yaml in order for helm to see it.   I gave it a quick try with the rename but policy chart had trouble coming up.   Take a look, do the rename, and check all naming is consistent throughout.   Thank you.

Michael, Morgan, is there a best way to mark a review, so to indicate that OOM team don't need to look at it just yet, so we make better use of your time?

Patch Set 3:

> Michael, Morgan, is there a best way to mark a review, so to
 > indicate that OOM team don't need to look at it just yet, so we
 > make better use of your time?

I would suggest to add [WIP] (work in Progress in the title of the patch
it will trigger the gate
but until it is here, it may not require extra processing
https://wiki.typo3.org/Gerrit_Review_Workflow

Patch Set 7:

Borislav, I am a little bit confused about the feedback with regards to when to allocate a NodePort or not.   I understood from your comment in this review:

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/81977/7/kubernetes/policy/charts/policy-xacml-pdp/templates/service.yaml@39

That the OOM team suggests to even if the intent is to use a ClusterIP, it's better to allocate a NodePort as a placeholder.   At the time, it seemed to me as an overkill, but we moved forward trying to follow this guideline.

I realize there may be ambiguity in your comment and/or misunderstandings in our part.

Can you clarify what's the recommendation to follow?

Patch Set 7:

Borislav, 
This is the correct link to the comment that is causing confusion on our side:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/79102/1/kubernetes/policy/charts/policy-pap/templates/service.yaml@32
instead of the previous one in the comment.

Patch Set 7:

Hi, can we get some clarification please?
